title: AppArmor refactorings and improvements
body: A bunch of changes and improvements (buildtime and runtime) for pkg/apparmor.

comments.body: Once that's in, I'll make CRI-O use this package (Cc @mrunalp).
@baude @mheon @rhatdan PTAL, the changes make a simple `podman run --rm alpine ls` around 200ms faster on my machine, which is surprising but very welcome ;-)

The tests are green, but only because papr isn't running. That threw me off for a bit.

Code LGTM though.
Let's see if homu is in an accomodating mood.

@rh-atomic-bot r+
...Did we lose the mergebot after moving to containers/libpod?

Can one of the admins verify this patch?
I understand the following commands:
- `bot, add author to whitelist`
- `bot, test pull request`
- `bot, test pull request once`
LGTM and happy green test buttons.

:pushpin: Commit 7e421e1 has been approved by `mheon`

<!-- @rh-atomic-bot r=mheon 7e421e12890ed755cf51ea48b00b81aac9f900fa -->

This is going to fail, given that papr tests are failing for now... Going to force it to proceed to the next PR
@rh-atomic-bot force

Alright, that didn't really work. Oh well.

Once #1267 merges we can start retrying failed PRs.
My attempts to force testing of another PR are probably just making things even slower, so I'm going to stop messing with this.
